OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "clonedContractRec": { "Name": "Will Clinician Mon Aug 18 00:00:00 GMT 2025", "UpsertSuccess": true, "Id": "8007x00000dDNJhAAO", "Clinician__c": "0037x000016CEG9AAO", "RecordTypeId": "0127x00000GcMEPAA3", "Perpetual__c": false, "OwnerId": "0057x00000RWwsbAAD", "AccountId": "0017x00001HMuu5AAD", "UpsertSObjectType": "Contract", "PreviousContractId": "8007x00000cT1sYAAS", "StartDate": "2025-08-06T00:00:00.000Z", "Status": "Draft" }, "providerNetworkContractList": { "Cloned_From__c": "0mw7x0000000sObAAI", "HealthcarePayerNetworkId": "0bf7x0000000BrVAAU", "EndDate": "2999-01-01T00:00:00.000Z", "HealthcareProviderId": "0cm7x000001hCTZAA2", "UpsertSuccess": true, "Id": "0mw7x0000000wATAAY", "ContractId": "8007x00000dDNJhAAO", "UpsertSObjectType": "ProviderNetworkContract", "Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c": "0bS7x0000003DgfEAE", "StartDate": "2025-08-18T00:00:00.000Z" }, "contractId": "8007x00000cT1sYAAS", "clonedContractId": "8007x00000dDNJhAAO" }

childElements.description: This list action will update the CPA with newly created PNC Ids
